strategy_engine.notes: VPS demo profile for Duo Base Dev strategy-file alerts. Each strategy's submit_orders + execution_mode controls whether and how it routes orders (sandbox vs live). Set HERMX_LIVE_TRADING=true to enable live execution. enforce_alert_schema defaults to false (observe-only): when false, alerts failing the tradingview-alert JSON schema are logged+counted but still processed as before; set true to quarantine schema-invalid alerts via the existing quarantine path.

notes: Use this profile only after Duo Base Dev alerts are confirmed open-ended. This profile is OKX sandbox/demo only.
